scripts.dev: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix PopJot" "npm run dev --prefix PopKey"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:electron --prefix PopJot" "npm run dev:electron --prefix PopKey"
scripts.build: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run build --prefix PopJot" "npm run build --prefix PopKey"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run typecheck --prefix PopJot" "npm run typecheck --prefix PopKey"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run lint --prefix PopJot" "npm run lint --prefix PopKey"
scripts.test: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run test --prefix PopJot" "npm run test --prefix PopKey"
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.dev:suite: concurrently -n suite:popjot,suite:popkey -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:popjot --prefix suite" "npm run dev:popkey --prefix suite"
